Pranapada]
Jyotisha ratnakara states that the Pranapada would be in
the trines or 7th of Lagna. And so he advises us to use it for
BT rectification.
But this method does not seem to be acceptable as per
BPHS, as evident from the following quote.

[The birth will be auspicious if Pranapada falls in the 2nd,
5th, 9th, 4th, lOth or 11th from the natal ascendant. ln other
houses, Pranapada indicates an inauspicious birth]
Sage Parasara gives us the results for Pranapada in all the
12 houses, which indicates that Parasara never suggested that
Pranapada would come only in the trines of lagna and 7th.
Thus it becomes clear that this method of using Pranapada
for BT rectification is neither logical, nor sage supported.
Demerits of Pranapada method
